highlights.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights) 2026/03/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Desmond Bane had a 3-pointer and two free throws in the final 17.4 seconds to cap a 35-point night and help the Orlando Magic hold off the Cleveland Cavaliers 128-122 on Wednesday for their fifth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Desmond Bane scores 35 points to help the Magic beat the Cavaliers 128-122

events.name: Toronto Raptors at New Orleans Pelicans

highlights.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Toronto Raptors vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Toronto Raptors vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights) 2026/03/12 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Trey Murphy III scored 28 points, Dejounte Murray added 27 and the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Toronto Raptors 122-111 on Wednesday night, spoiling Brandon Ingram's return to the city where he played for six seasons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murphy and Murray lead Pelicans to 122-111 win over Raptors in Ingram's return to New Orleans

events.name: New York Knicks at Utah Jazz

highlights.description: New York Knicks vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights) 2026/03/12 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 28 points, Jordan Clarkson had 27 and the New York Knicks rallied to beat the Utah Jazz 134-117 on Wednesday night to snap a two-game losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks beat the Jazz 134-117 to end a 2-game losing streak

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights) 2026/03/12 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 16 points, 13 assists and 12 rebounds for his 25th triple-double of the season, and the Denver Nuggets beat the Houston Rockets 129-93 in a Western Conference showdown Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jokic has his 25th triple-double of the season, the Nuggets rout the Rockets 129-93

headlines.description: — LaMelo Ball scored 20 of his 30 points in the first half and the Charlotte Hornets beat the Sacramento Kings 117-109 on Wednesday night.

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 45 points and the Los Angeles Clippers routed the Minnesota Timberwolves 153-128 on Wednesday night, moving above .500 with their third straight victory and sixth in seven games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard scores 45 points in the Clippers' 153-128 romp over the Timberwolves
